query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `snoozed_violations` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `symbol` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `account_number` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `violation_type` varchar(40) NOT NULL,
  `snoozed_until` bigint NOT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `snoozed_violations_user_idx` (`user_id`),
  KEY `snoozed_violations_lookup_idx` (`user_id`, `symbol`, `account_number`, `violation_type`),
  CONSTRAINT `snoozed_violations_user_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);
